proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_tamoxifen, in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_palbociclib, in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_trastuzumab, in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib, in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan, in the overall cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab, in the overall cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.723 on treatment_tamoxifen (n=15035) vs 4.680 off (n=34965); Welch t-test p=0.0769, mean diff=+0.043 months.
Mean pfs_months 5.408 on treatment_palbociclib (n=17428) vs 4.310 off (n=32572); Welch t-test p=0, mean diff=+1.098 months.
Mean pfs_months 4.645 on treatment_trastuzumab (n=10039) vs 4.705 off (n=39961); Welch t-test p=0.0292, mean diff=-0.060 months.
Mean pfs_months 4.660 on treatment_olaparib (n=4946) vs 4.696 off (n=45054); Welch t-test p=0.33, mean diff=-0.036 months.
Mean pfs_months 4.686 on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (n=4987) vs 4.694 off (n=45013); Welch t-test p=0.846, mean diff=-0.007 months.
Mean pfs_months 4.630 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=7585) vs 4.704 off (n=42415); Welch t-test p=0.0175, mean diff=-0.074 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: ER-positive patients (er_positive=1) have higher mean pfs_months than ER-negative patients in the overall cohort.
PR-positive patients (pr_positive=1) have higher mean pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
HER2-positive patients (her2_positive=1) have lower mean pfs_months than HER2-negative patients (untreated context).
Stage IV patients (stage_iv=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than non-stage-IV patients.
Node-positive patients have shorter mean pfs_months than node-negative patients.
Patients with brain metastases (has_brain_mets=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without.
Patients with liver metastases (liver_mets=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without.
Patients with bone metastases (bone_mets=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.865 (n=34886) for er_positive=1 vs 4.297 (n=15114) for er_positive=0; mean diff=+0.568, p=3.7e-143.
Mean pfs_months 4.824 (n=31954) for pr_positive=1 vs 4.462 (n=18046) for pr_positive=0; mean diff=+0.362, p=5.82e-59.
Mean pfs_months 4.317 (n=9060) for her2_positive=1 vs 4.776 (n=40940) for her2_positive=0; mean diff=-0.459, p=6.1e-70.
Mean pfs_months 3.617 (n=14969) for stage_iv=1 vs 5.153 (n=35031) for stage_iv=0; mean diff=-1.536, p=0.
Mean pfs_months 4.681 (n=25053) for node_positive=1 vs 4.705 (n=24947) for node_positive=0; mean diff=-0.024, p=0.292.
Mean pfs_months 3.750 (n=5090) for has_brain_mets=1 vs 4.800 (n=44910) for has_brain_mets=0; mean diff=-1.050, p=1.45e-178.
Mean pfs_months 4.708 (n=7546) for liver_mets=1 vs 4.690 (n=42454) for liver_mets=0; mean diff=+0.018, p=0.555.
Mean pfs_months 4.723 (n=10067) for bone_mets=1 vs 4.685 (n=39933) for bone_mets=0; mean diff=+0.038, p=0.17.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with higher pfs_months (positive linear association in the overall cohort).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher pfs_months.
Higher ki67_pct is associated with lower pfs_months (more proliferative tumors progress sooner).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower pfs_months.
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with lower pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=0.7015 (p=0); OLS slope of pfs_months on age_years = +0.17592 months per unit.
Pearson r=0.1002 (p=9.39e-112); OLS slope of pfs_months on albumin_g_dl = +0.49877 months per unit.
Pearson r=-0.0914 (p=2.98e-93); OLS slope of pfs_months on ki67_pct = -0.01876 months per unit.
Pearson r=-0.1155 (p=4.07e-148); OLS slope of pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07473 months per unit.
Pearson r=-0.0164 (p=0.000245); OLS slope of pfs_months on ldh_u_l = -0.00051 months per unit.
Pearson r=-0.0033 (p=0.461); OLS slope of pfs_months on crp_mg_l = -0.00088 months per unit.
Pearson r=0.0028 (p=0.537); OLS slope of pfs_months on nlr = +0.00331 months per unit.
Pearson r=0.0004 (p=0.931); OLS slope of pfs_months on tumor_size_cm = +0.00055 months per unit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_tamoxifen prolongs pfs_months more in ER-positive (er_positive=1) patients than in ER-negative patients (positive interaction).
treatment_palbociclib prolongs pfs_months specifically in HR-positive/HER2-negative patients (hr_pos_her2_neg=1) and not in others (positive interaction).
treatment_trastuzumab prolongs pfs_months more in HER2-positive (her2_positive=1) patients than HER2-negative (positive interaction).
treatment_olaparib prolongs pfs_months more in BRCA1/2 carriers (brca_any=1) than in non-carriers (positive interaction).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan prolongs pfs_months more in TNBC (tnbc=1) patients than non-TNBC (positive interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab prolongs pfs_months more in TNBC (tnbc=1) patients than non-TNBC (positive interaction).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen * er_positive', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive coef=-0.058 (p=0.27). In er_positive=1: PFS 4.881 on treatment_tamoxifen vs 4.858 off; in er_positive=0: PFS 4.354 on treatment_tamoxifen vs 4.272 off.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * hr_pos_her2_neg', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos_her2_neg
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos_her2_neg coef=+1.820 (p=0). In hr_pos_her2_neg=1: PFS 6.119 on treatment_palbociclib vs 4.308 off; in hr_pos_her2_neg=0: PFS 4.305 on treatment_palbociclib vs 4.314 off.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab * her2_positive', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive coef=-0.028 (p=0.695). In her2_positive=1: PFS 4.254 on treatment_trastuzumab vs 4.334 off; in her2_positive=0: PFS 4.735 on treatment_trastuzumab vs 4.786 off.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca_any', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_olaparib:brca_any
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_olaparib:brca_any coef=+0.402 (p=0.0208). In brca_any=1: PFS 4.933 on treatment_olaparib vs 4.587 off; in brca_any=0: PFS 4.646 on treatment_olaparib vs 4.702 off.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan * tnbc', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc coef=-0.105 (p=0.246). In tnbc=1: PFS 4.228 on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan vs 4.314 off; in tnbc=0: PFS 4.813 on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan vs 4.794 off.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * tnbc', data=df).fit()  # interaction term treatment_pembrolizumab:tnbc
analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:tnbc coef=+0.185 (p=0.0152). In tnbc=1: PFS 4.366 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 4.294 off; in tnbc=0: PFS 4.699 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 4.813 off.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within HR-positive/HER2-negative patients (hr_pos_her2_neg=1), treatment_palbociclib produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_palbociclib.
Within patients who are NOT HR-positive/HER2-negative, treatment_palbociclib does not change mean pfs_months versus no treatment_palbociclib.
Within BRCA1/2-mutated patients (brca_any=1), treatment_olaparib produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_olaparib.
Within BRCA-wildtype patients, treatment_olaparib does not change mean pfs_months versus no treatment_olaparib.
Within HER2-positive patients, treatment_trastuzumab produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_trastuzumab.
Within TNBC patients, treatment_pembrolizumab produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_pembrolizumab.
Within TNBC patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan.

analyses.result_summary: Within hr_pos_her2_neg=1: PFS 6.119 on treatment_palbociclib (n=10598) vs 4.308 off (n=19846); diff=+1.811 months, Welch p=0.
Within hr_pos_her2_neg=0: PFS 4.305 on treatment_palbociclib (n=6830) vs 4.314 off (n=12726); diff=-0.009 months, Welch p=0.783.
Within brca_any=1: PFS 4.933 on treatment_olaparib (n=239) vs 4.587 off (n=2260); diff=+0.346 months, Welch p=0.0414.
Within brca_any=0: PFS 4.646 on treatment_olaparib (n=4707) vs 4.702 off (n=42794); diff=-0.056 months, Welch p=0.143.
Within her2_positive=1: PFS 4.254 on treatment_trastuzumab (n=1890) vs 4.334 off (n=7170); diff=-0.079 months, Welch p=0.153.
Within tnbc=1: PFS 4.366 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=1578) vs 4.294 off (n=8918); diff=+0.072 months, Welch p=0.222.
Within tnbc=1: PFS 4.228 on treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan (n=1084) vs 4.314 off (n=9412); diff=-0.085 months, Welch p=0.217.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=-0.3204 (p=0); OLS slope = -1.17997 months per unit of ecog_ps.
Pearson r=-0.0046 (p=0.304); OLS slope = -0.00639 months per unit of hemoglobin_g_dl.
Pearson r=-0.0133 (p=0.00295); OLS slope = -0.00067 months per unit of alkaline_phosphatase_u_l.
Pearson r=-0.0089 (p=0.0458); OLS slope = -0.07050 months per unit of total_bilirubin_mg_dl.
Pearson r=-0.0016 (p=0.72); OLS slope = -0.00149 months per unit of pain_nrs.
Pearson r=0.0046 (p=0.299); OLS slope = +0.01037 months per unit of dyspnea_grade.
Pearson r=0.0002 (p=0.963); OLS slope = +0.00047 months per unit of fatigue_grade.
Pearson r=-0.0008 (p=0.861); OLS slope = -0.00183 months per unit of appetite_loss_grade.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Female patients (sex_female=1) have higher mean pfs_months than male patients.
Postmenopausal patients (postmenopausal=1) have higher mean pfs_months than non-postmenopausal patients.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have lower mean pfs_months than non-rural patients.
White patients (race_ethnicity='white') have higher mean pfs_months than Black patients (race_ethnicity='black').
Patients with private insurance (insurance_type='private') have higher mean pfs_months than patients with Medicaid (insurance_type='medicaid').
Patients with private insurance have higher mean pfs_months than uninsured patients (insurance_type='uninsured').

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.686 (n=22371) for sex_female=1 vs 4.699 (n=27629) for sex_female=0; diff=-0.013, p=0.562.
Mean pfs_months 4.684 (n=30238) for postmenopausal=1 vs 4.707 (n=19762) for postmenopausal=0; diff=-0.023, p=0.311.
Mean pfs_months 4.714 (n=9996) for rural_residence=1 vs 4.688 (n=40004) for rural_residence=0; diff=+0.027, p=0.343.
Mean pfs_months 4.679 (n=32498) white vs 4.717 (n=5889) black; diff=-0.037, p=0.292.
Mean pfs_months 4.685 (n=20090) private vs 4.706 (n=6911) medicaid; diff=-0.021, p=0.537.
Mean pfs_months 4.685 (n=20090) private vs 4.733 (n=2046) uninsured; diff=-0.048, p=0.411.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with hypertension=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
prior_immunotherapy=1 patients have shorter mean pfs_months than those without prior immunotherapy.
prior_chemotherapy=1 patients have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.710 (n=11073) for diabetes_mellitus=1 vs 4.688 (n=38927) for diabetes_mellitus=0; diff=+0.022, p=0.413.
Mean pfs_months 4.692 (n=27510) for hypertension=1 vs 4.694 (n=22490) for hypertension=0; diff=-0.002, p=0.913.
Mean pfs_months 4.707 (n=6060) for chronic_kidney_disease=1 vs 4.691 (n=43940) for chronic_kidney_disease=0; diff=+0.016, p=0.642.
Mean pfs_months 4.707 (n=5038) for heart_failure=1 vs 4.691 (n=44962) for heart_failure=0; diff=+0.016, p=0.671.
Mean pfs_months 4.651 (n=6032) for prior_malignancy=1 vs 4.699 (n=43968) for prior_malignancy=0; diff=-0.047, p=0.166.
Mean pfs_months 4.692 (n=7501) for prior_immunotherapy=1 vs 4.693 (n=42499) for prior_immunotherapy=0; diff=-0.001, p=0.98.
Mean pfs_months 4.694 (n=22442) for prior_chemotherapy=1 vs 4.692 (n=27558) for prior_chemotherapy=0; diff=+0.002, p=0.936.
Pearson r=0.0042 (p=0.343); OLS slope = +0.00933 months per added line.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within ER-positive patients, treatment_tamoxifen prolongs pfs_months more in postmenopausal patients than in pre-menopausal patients (positive interaction).
Within ER-positive AND pre-menopausal patients (postmenopausal=0), treatment_tamoxifen produces higher pfs_months than no treatment_tamoxifen.

Within HR-positive/HER2-negative patients, treatment_palbociclib provides additional pfs_months benefit in PIK3CA-mutated (pik3ca_mutation=1) patients on top of any baseline benefit (positive treatment_palbociclib × pik3ca_mutation interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In ER+ subset, interaction treatment_tamoxifen:postmenopausal coef=-0.034 (p=0.587). Tamoxifen main coef=+0.044 (p=0.37).
In ER+/pre-menopausal: PFS 4.921 on tamoxifen (n=4191) vs 4.877 off (n=9614); diff=+0.044, p=0.377.
In HR+/HER2- subset, interaction treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation coef=-2.726 (p=0). Palbociclib main coef=+2.740 (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within BRCA1-mutation carriers (brca1_mutation=1), treatment_olaparib produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_olaparib.
Within BRCA2-mutation carriers (brca2_mutation=1), treatment_olaparib produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_olaparib.
treatment_olaparib has a stronger pfs_months effect in BRCA1-mutated patients than in BRCA1-wildtype patients (positive treatment_olaparib × brca1_mutation interaction).

analyses.code: ttest olaparib vs no in df[df.brca1_mutation==1]
analyses.result_summary: Within BRCA1+: PFS 5.030 on olaparib (n=120) vs 4.632 off (n=1157); diff=+0.398, p=0.117.

analyses.code: ttest olaparib vs no in df[df.brca2_mutation==1]
analyses.result_summary: Within BRCA2+: PFS 4.835 on olaparib (n=119) vs 4.540 off (n=1103); diff=+0.295, p=0.192.
Interaction treatment_olaparib:brca1_mutation coef=+0.446 (p=0.0659).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, and the four other treatments, treatment_palbociclib remains positively associated with pfs_months in HR+/HER2- patients.
After adjustment for the same covariates, treatment_olaparib remains positively associated with pfs_months in BRCA1/2 carriers.

analyses.code: OLS with all covariates in HR+/HER2- subset
analyses.result_summary: In HR+/HER2-: adjusted treatment_palbociclib coef=+1.809 (p=0). N=30444.

analyses.code: OLS with all covariates in BRCA-mutated subset
analyses.result_summary: In BRCA1/2+: adjusted treatment_olaparib coef=+0.060 (p=0.475). N=2499.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across ECOG strata (0, 1, 2+), mean pfs_months declines monotonically with worse performance status.
Patients with pain_nrs >= 5 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with pain_nrs < 5.
Within HR+/HER2- patients, the combination of tamoxifen + palbociclib has higher mean pfs_months than palbociclib alone (positive interaction term tam:palbo or simply higher mean in the combo cell).
Within HR+/HER2- patients, the OLS interaction term treatment_tamoxifen:treatment_palbociclib is non-zero (synergy or antagonism between the two endocrine-related agents).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_tamoxifen:treatment_palbociclib coef=-0.042 (p=0.526).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher systolic_bp_mmhg is associated with higher pfs_months.
Higher diastolic_bp_mmhg is associated with higher pfs_months.
Higher heart_rate_bpm is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher spo2_pct is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher ast_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alt_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ca_125_u_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher psa_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
At least one of the 24 SNP variables (snp_*) has a non-zero main-effect on pfs_months at p<0.05.

analyses.code: for snp in snp_cols: t-test pfs_months by snp
analyses.result_summary: Tested 24 SNPs as binary carriers; 1 reached p<0.05 (Bonferroni threshold ≈0.0021). Top: snp_rs1801131 diff=-0.054 p=0.0255

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib's pfs_months benefit in HR+/HER2- patients is reduced or absent in patients with brain metastases (negative treatment_palbociclib × has_brain_mets interaction).
Within TNBC, treatment_pembrolizumab's effect on pfs_months differs in patients with brain metastases compared to those without (non-zero treatment_pembrolizumab × has_brain_mets interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In HR+/HER2-: interaction treatment_palbociclib:has_brain_mets coef=-0.031 (p=0.762).
In TNBC: interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:has_brain_mets coef=-0.169 (p=0.384).

proposed_hypotheses.text: TNBC patients (tnbc=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than HR+/HER2- patients (hr_pos_her2_neg=1).
HER2+ patients (her2_positive=1) have shorter mean pfs_months than HR+/HER2- patients.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, liver_mets, weight_loss_pct_6mo, ki67_pct, and the six treatments, age_years remains independently positively associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, albumin_g_dl remains independently positively associated with pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, weight_loss_pct_6mo remains independently negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coef on age_years = +0.17545 months per unit, p=0. R^2=0.7800, N=50000.
Adjusted coef on albumin_g_dl = +0.47732 months per unit, p=0. R^2=0.7800, N=50000.
Adjusted coef on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07700 months per unit, p=0. R^2=0.7800, N=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among male patients (sex_female=0), treatment_tamoxifen produces higher mean pfs_months than no treatment_tamoxifen.
Within HR+/HER2-, the treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months differs by sex (treatment_palbociclib × sex_female interaction is non-zero).

analyses.code: ttest treatment_tamoxifen vs no in df[sex_female==0]

analyses.result_summary: In HR+/HER2-: interaction treatment_palbociclib:sex_female coef=-0.031 (p=0.616).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Race/ethnicity (race_ethnicity, treated as a 5-level factor) is associated with pfs_months in the overall cohort (omnibus F-test).
Within HR+/HER2- patients, the effect of treatment_palbociclib on pfs_months differs across race/ethnicity strata (significant interaction F-test).

analyses.result_summary: Omnibus F=0.849, p=0.494 for race_ethnicity factor; R^2=0.0001.

analyses.code: anova_lm of additive vs interaction model in HR+/HER2- subset
analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=0.129, p=0.972 for treatment_palbociclib × race_ethnicity within HR+/HER2-.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among stage_iv=1 patients, those with private insurance have higher mean pfs_months than those with Medicaid (stage-IV survival gap by insurance).
Insurance × stage_iv interaction in OLS predicting pfs_months is non-zero (insurance modifies stage prognosis).

analyses.code: ttest private vs medicaid in df[stage_iv==1]
analyses.result_summary: Stage IV: private mean PFS=3.599 (n=6080) vs medicaid 3.654 (n=2048); diff=-0.055, p=0.358.

analyses.code: anova_lm comparing additive and stage_iv:insurance interaction models
analyses.result_summary: Interaction F=0.274, p=0.844.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.
A composite count of visceral metastatic sites (liver_mets + has_brain_mets + bone_mets + adrenal_mets + pleural_effusion) is negatively associated with pfs_months in a dose-response manner.
Within HR+/HER2- patients, the treatment_palbociclib pfs_months benefit is attenuated as visceral burden increases (negative treatment_palbociclib × visceral_count interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Slope on visceral_count=-0.154 months per added site (p=1.09e-26).
In HR+/HER2-: interaction treatment_palbociclib:visceral_count coef=+0.057 (p=0.15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Even after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, brain/liver/bone mets, weight loss, ki67, and the other five treatments, the treatment_palbociclib × hr_pos_her2_neg interaction term remains positively significant for pfs_months.
After the same adjustment, the treatment_olaparib × brca_any interaction term remains positively significant for pfs_months.
In the fully adjusted model age_years has a larger absolute t-statistic for predicting pfs_months than any single binary treatment indicator.

analyses.code: OLS with treatment_palbociclib*hr_pos_her2_neg + treatment_olaparib*brca_any plus full covariate set
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_palbociclib:hr_pos_her2_neg coef=+1.803 (p=0). Adj R^2=0.8091.

analyses.code: OLS with treatment_palbociclib*hr_pos_her2_neg + treatment_olaparib*brca_any plus full covariate set
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_olaparib:brca_any coef=+0.006 (p=0.935).

analyses.code: compare |t| of age_years vs max |t| among treatment_* terms in adjusted model
analyses.result_summary: |t| age_years=358.10; max |t| among single-treatment terms = 1.28 (term: treatment_trastuzumab).
